description: Search manifest for AgentLoom flagship repository — v3 executable framework layout

collections.name: core
collections.description: High-level project documentation and governance references.

collections.name: framework
collections.description: Runnable v3 framework — installable Python package under src/agentloom/.

collections.name: governance
collections.description: KG maintenance, propose-review protocol, and Tier-A validator wiring.

collections.name: archive
collections.description: Historical protocol packages (v1/v2/v3 prototypes) — reference only, not runnable.

collections.name: collaboration
collections.description: Contribution guides, templates, and case study documentation.

collections.name: clinerules
collections.description: Generated Cline host configuration synced from builder KG.

collections.name: meta
collections.description: Metadata, manifests, and indexing support files.

notes.structure: Reorganized Jun 2026 — runnable framework in src/agentloom/, historical protocol in archive/protocol/, research layer removed from flagship.
notes.framework: AgentLoom v3.0.0 is the current production version (pip install -e .[dev])
notes.search_priority: Prioritize src/agentloom/, agents/knowledge-graphs/, and docs/builder/ for RAG indexing
